rejection_reason: structure: email_require_personalization — cold email opens with 'Hi there' and contains no {{first_name}} or {{company}} token. Every cold outreach email must reference the recipient by name or company name in the body.
text:
Subject: Saving 2 hours a day with FlowAI

Hi there,

I wanted to reach out about FlowAI, a productivity platform that helps busy professionals save an average of 2 hours per day.

We integrate with 50+ popular tools and are trusted by 10,000+ professionals across industries.

Would you be open to a quick 15-minute call to see how FlowAI could help your team?

[Signature]

FlowAI · 123 Main St, San Francisco CA 94105 · Unsubscribe
